creator: makc@issp.ac.ru
text:
both of sgraphics/dl_ttf and x11-fonts/showfont install showfont binary in the same location:
/root# pkg_info -L sdl_ttf-2.0.8_2 showfont-1.0.1
Information for sdl_ttf-2.0.8_2:

Files:
/usr/local/bin/glfont
/usr/local/bin/showfont <<<
/usr/local/include/SDL/SDL_ttf.h
/usr/local/lib/libSDL_ttf.a
/usr/local/lib/libSDL_ttf.la
/usr/local/lib/libSDL_ttf.so
/usr/local/lib/libSDL_ttf.so.6

Information for showfont-1.0.1:

Files:
/usr/local/bin/showfont <<<
/usr/local/man/man1/showfont.1.gz
